title: Qualifications of board members
doc_html:
§711.5.  Qualifications of board members

Each member of the board shall be a citizen of the United States and a resident of this state for at least the three years preceding appointment.

Acts 2010, No. 974, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2011.
